name: Jack van Wijk
review: It gives me joy to just think, I am now a Dev in Coding: Superficial Games!

name: Chloe Gray-Morgan
review: I just love to work with Jack and Neve and I just think Superficial Games... what an amazing name!

name: Neve Tucker
review: I love to organize the tree, and if Jack AND Chloe are sick, I am the boss for that day.

name: Isabelle Gao
review: I am the Guard at Superficial Games HQ and I stop people from coming in without a permit.
